polar and equatorial radii for Uranus's 1-bar isobaric surface. models are described in Mankovich et al. 2026, PSJ.
the models in this file assume the voyager wind profile from Tollefson et al. (2018, Icarus 311).
the distribution of models in this file comes from randomly drawing the gravity moments j2,j4 from Gaussians with means and standard deviations from Jacobson 2009.
index         r_pol_km          r_eq_km
